input.headline: TSA proposes charging customers who don't have a Real ID or passport

raw.headline: TSA proposes charging customers who don't have a Real ID or passport

winner: Why did the traveler bring his passport and wallet to the airport, but still end up paying twice? Because TSA proposed charging customers who don't have a Real ID or just their wallet!

candidates.text: Why did the traveler bring a driver's license and passport, along with a bag of cash to the airport? Because he heard TSA started charging for "real" identification!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant and has a basic setup, but the humor is weak and relies on a predictable twist without much surprise or specificity."}

candidates.text: Why did the TSA start accepting coins at security checkpoints? Because they realized many Americans still haven't upgraded from pennies!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks direct connection to Real IDs or passports. It's a bit generic and relies on a pun that doesn't fully align with the TSA's proposal."}

candidates.text: Why did the traveler bring his passport and wallet to the airport, but still end up paying twice? Because TSA proposed charging customers who don't have a Real ID or just their wallet!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the twist about paying twice, but it's a bit forced and relies heavily on the specific context of the headline. It could be more concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: At the airport, they now accept Venmo for those without a Real ID or passport. Just add a note: "For security check at TSA.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific to the situation, but it's a bit generic in its humor and lacks a strong punchline or deeper twist."}

candidates.text: Why did the traveler bring a driver's license and a passport to the airport baggage check? Because TSA charges for carrying coins!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 4.5, "reason": "The joke is loosely related but lacks specificity and surprise; the connection between TSA charging for coins and not having a Real ID or passport is unclear and forced."}
